exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your coming out forward
items: Research and identify 3-5 trusted support resources in your area (LGBTQ+ centers, support groups, or therapists)
Create a list of your personal values and non-negotiable needs for relationships and living situations
Schedule a consultation with an LGBTQ+-affirming therapist or counselor to explore your identity and feelings
Research and document legal protections and rights in your state/country regarding LGBTQ+ discrimination in employment, housing, and healthcare
Create a detailed financial safety plan including emergency fund, important documents, and backup housing options
Write a letter to yourself expressing your authentic identity, feelings, and hopes for the future (for your eyes only)
